leaf_weight=28.045363157987595 1.7635477185249318 1.3824070543050768 1.1014856994152067 1.1452374607324598 2.2479072064161301
leaf_count=114 8 7 6 5 9
internal_value=0 -0.00593843 -0.00291787 0 -0.00185072
internal_weight=35.6859 7.64059 5.87704 4.77555 3.63031
internal_count=149 35 27 21 16

shrinkage=0.05


end of trees
